nl: Show all orders with the customer name who placed them
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, o.order_id, o.order_date, o.status FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id

nl: Find names of customers who placed delivered orders
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, o.order_date FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'delivered'

nl: Show product names and quantities for each order item
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price FROM products p INNER JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id

nl: Find customers from New York and their orders
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, o.order_id, o.status FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.city = 'New York'

nl: List electronics products that have been ordered
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, oi.quantity FROM products p INNER JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE p.category = 'electronics'

nl: Show gold tier customers and their pending orders
gold_sql: SELECT c.name, c.tier, o.order_id FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.tier = 'gold' AND o.status = 'pending'
